title: How Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian are adopting AI coding
summary: Engineering leaders from Intuit, DoorDash, and Atlassian discuss how their organizations are adopting AI coding tools. Topics include workflow changes, productivity measurement, reduced timeline from nine-month to one-month roadmaps, and reallocation of engineer time toward non-coding tasks.
